mapper.select: SELECT company_id as value, company_name as label FROM test_company WHERE type =#{TypeId} order by add_time desc
SELECT id, NAME, type, remark FROM test_init_data
SELECT id as value, NAME as label FROM test_team
SELECT customer_id personId, contacts clientName, phone clientMobilePhone FROM test_customer WHERE company_id = #{companyId}

SELECT company_id AS companyId, company_name AS companyName, type, address, add_time AS addTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM test_company
AND company_name like CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%')
AND type = #{type}
AND company_id in( SELECT company_id FROM test_customer WHERE contacts like CONCAT('%',#{contacts},'%') )
AND company_id in( SELECT company_id FROM test_customer WHERE phone like CONCAT('%',#{phone},'%') )
ORDER BY company_id
${order}
